{{Quote|Bocatts! They can be dangerous customers. They are native to Tatooine.|[[Raylen Finn]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:STStG" />}}
'''Bocatts''' were predatory creatures native to the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> They had brown, leathery hide and two tusks.<ref name="SWG" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a cargo containing bocatts in cages was shipped to [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. Upon being unloaded on the station, the creatures escaped the cages and attacked a guard. A [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] working for the station's [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Raylen Finn]] later rescued the guard and killed a number of beasts.<ref name="SWG:STStG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Bokatt_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Bocatts appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
